narrative:
Liberty Township (precinct in Adams County) has 1,265 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.4 percentage points.
